title: Running the PTC-0200 DNA Engine
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.in7cdhn
materials: Select YES or NO for heated lid

steps.title: Press ENTER to create a new program
steps.instruction: Press ENTER to create a new program

steps.title: Name the program by using the...
steps.instruction: Name the program by using the right SELECT key or the left SELECT key to scroll through the characters, and press PROCEED when the desired character is displayed.

steps.title: Press PROCEED when the name is complete
steps.instruction: Press PROCEED when the name is complete

steps.title: Enter each step of the program
steps.instruction: Enter each step of the program: (TEMP, GRADIENT, GOTO, RAMP, END)

steps.title: Select the folder that you want...
steps.instruction: Select the folder that you want to save to, and press PROCEED to save.

steps.title: Select a folder that contains a...
steps.instruction: Select a folder that contains a protocol that you want to run

steps.title: The program will begin to run...
steps.instruction: The program will begin to run Press CANCEL and YES to cancel the program
